zh.Newcastle, Northumberland, England, Unit: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anthony Selby於大約1410年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾塞爾比時，他的父親Walter Selby30歲，母親Margaret Bristowe21歲。他於大約1432年與Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1470年1月1日在英國英格蘭享年61歲。

zh-hans.Newcastle, Northumberland, England, Unit: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anthony Selby于大约1410年出生在英国英格兰越可爾塞爾比时，他的父亲Walter Selby30岁，母亲Margaret Bristowe21岁。他于大约1432年与Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1470年1月1日在英国英格兰享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Selby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire) and Scottish: habitational name from Selby (Yorkshire). The placename may derive from Old English sele ‘willow copse’, sometimes alternating with salh ‘willow’, + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.
Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

variants.name: Shelby
meanings: English (Essex and Middlesex): probably a variant of   Selby  .

nameMeanings.name: Anthony
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English form of the old Roman family name Antonius, which is of uncertain (probably Etruscan) origin. The spelling with -th- (not normally reflected in the pronunciation) represents a learned but erroneous attempt to associate it with Greek anthos ‘flower’. In the post-classical period it was a common name, borne by various early saints, most notably a 3rd-century Egyptian hermit monk, who is regarded as the founder of Christian monasticism.

en.lifeSummary: When Anthony Selby was born about 1410, in Selby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter Selby, was 30 and his mother, Margaret Bristowe, was 21. He married Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield about 1432, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 1 January 1470, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.Newcastle, Northumberland, England, Unit: Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anthony Selby est né environ 1410, à Selby, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter Selby, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret Bristowe, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield environ 1432, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 1 janvier 1470, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.Newcastle, Northumberland, England, Unit: Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Anthony Selby um 1410 in Selby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Selby 30 und seine Mutter Margaret Bristowe 21. Er hat um 1432 in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Januar 1470 im Alter von 61 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anthony Selby è nato il circa 1410 nel Selby, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Walter Selby, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Bristowe, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield circa 1432, nel Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 gennaio 1470, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.Newcastle, Northumberland, England, Unit: イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トイン
ja.lifeSummary: Anthony Selbyが約1410年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアセルビーで生まれた時，父Walter Selbyは30歳，母Margaret Bristoweは21歳であった。約1432年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインでJoyce Eugaine Huntingfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1470年1月1日にイギリスイギリスで61歳で死去した。

ko.Newcastle, Northumberland, England, Unit: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: Anthony Selby(이)가 대략 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 셀비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Selby(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Bristowe(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1432년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1470년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anthony Selby nasceu aproximadamente 1410, em Selby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter Selby, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Bristowe, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield aproximadamente 1432, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1470, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos.

ru.Newcastle, Northumberland, England, Unit: нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anthony Selby родился около 1410 г. в местности селби, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter Selby было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Bristowe, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield около 1432 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 1 января 1470 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.

Se casó con Joyce Eugaine Huntingfield aproximadamente 1432, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas.
